notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 10-14 in generated discovery row order.

conjure-elemental::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses air, earth, fire, or water, which determines Lightning, Thunder, Fire, or Cold damage; runtime has variable damage but no typed element-to-damage option map.
conjure-elemental::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked summon mode fields for element choice and resulting damage type.

conjure-elemental::attack_or_save_modifi.issue: The spirit forces Dexterity saves when a visible creature enters its space or starts its turn within 5 feet, only if the spirit has no creature Restrained; runtime lacks these trigger filters and occupancy restriction.
conjure-elemental::attack_or_save_modifi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-hazard save trigger fields for enter-space, start-turn-nearby, visible target, and no-current-restrained-target gating.

conjure-elemental::target_filter_or_elig.issue: The Large intangible spirit appears in an unoccupied space within range; runtime targets a point but lacks unoccupied-space placement, Large size, and intangible entity fields.
conjure-elemental::target_filter_or_elig.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity placement fields for unoccupied space, size, and physicality.
conjure-elemental::target_filter_or_elig.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spiritPlacement and spiritPhysicality data.

conjure-elemental::repeat_save_or_recurr.closedReason: Conjure Elemental now records the Restrained target's start-turn Dexterity repeat save, failed-repeat damage, and success ending as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data.
conjure-elemental::repeat_save_or_recurr.issue: A Restrained target repeats the save at the start of each of its turns, taking 4d8 damage on a failed repeat and ending Restrained on success; runtime only has initial 8d8 damage.
conjure-elemental::repeat_save_or_recurr.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeat-save fields that can carry failed-repeat damage and success ending.

conjure-elemental::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched the requirement that the caster can see the creature being forced to save; this is a target/trigger visibility filter, not a light, vision, or sound effect.

conjure-elemental::created_object_or_str.issue: The created thing is a summoned elemental spirit rather than an object or structure.

conjure-elemental::summon_or_controlled_.issue: The spell creates a Large intangible elemental spirit with element modes, duration, placement, save-triggered damage, one-restrained-creature capacity, and repeat-save behavior; runtime has only a generic damage effect.
conjure-elemental::summon_or_controlled_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created spirit/hazard fields for identity, element choice, placement, trigger rules, capacity, and lifecycle.

conjure-elemental::travel_or_planar_move.issue: The spirit comes from the Elemental Planes as source flavor for the summon; no creature or target is transported between planes by the spell.
conjure-elemental::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the source under summoned-entity origin if needed, not travel movement.
conjure-elemental::travel_or_planar_move.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

conjure-elemental::resource_or_consumpti.issue: The detector matched elemental damage type choice, but the spell does not create or consume a resource.
conjure-elemental::resource_or_consumpti.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under choice/mode and damage type fields.

conjure-elemental::status_or_state_chang.issue: Failed saves apply Restrained until the spell ends, with start-turn repeat saves and one-creature capacity; runtime lacks the Restrained status and linked repeat-save damage branch.
conjure-elemental::status_or_state_chang.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked status/rider fields for restrained-by-created-spirit, capacity, repeat saves, and failed-repeat damage.
conjure-elemental::status_or_state_chang.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Restrained effect linked to elementalSpiritTrigger.

conjure-elemental::environmental_change.issue: The elemental mode changes damage type and the spirit creates a localized hazard, but it does not otherwise alter terrain or environment.
conjure-elemental::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under summon/hazard and damage-type choice fields.

conjure-elemental::conditional_ending.issue: Restrained lasts until the spell ends or until the repeat save succeeds; this is status repeat-save behavior rather than a separate spell-ending condition.
conjure-elemental::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under status and repeat-save fields.
conjure-elemental::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No separate conditional-ending runtime data required.

conjure-volley::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster uses either ranged ammunition or a thrown weapon, and the damage type matches that item; runtime now has variable damage but no typed source-item damage-type inheritance.
conjure-volley::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage-type inheritance fields from material/source weapon or ammunition.

conjure-volley::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save, half-damage outcome, 8d8 variable damage, area targeting, and 20-foot cylinder height are now represented.
conjure-volley::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
conjure-volley::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a DAMAGE effect and correcting the targeting to area.

conjure-volley::environmental_change.issue: The duplicated ammunition or weapon falls and then disappears as instantaneous attack presentation; no persistent environmental change remains.

contact-other-plane::attack_or_save_modi.issue: The Intelligence save, failed-save Psychic damage, and Incapacitated condition are now represented, but runtime lacks the fixed DC 15 override and success-gated access to questions.
contact-other-plane::attack_or_save_modi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add fixed save DC override fields and success-gated utility branch fields.
contact-other-plane::attack_or_save_modi.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime fixedDc 15 and successBranch data.

contact-other-plane::summon_or_controlle.issue: The spell contacts an otherworldly intelligence but does not summon or control an entity into the scene.

contact-other-plane::travel_or_planar_mo.issue: The mental contact reaches another plane but does not move a creature or object between planes.
contact-other-plane::travel_or_planar_mo.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

contact-other-plane::social_or_knowledge.issue: On a successful DC 15 Intelligence save, the caster can ask up to five questions before the spell ends and receives one-word or short-phrase answers; runtime lacks typed planar information query fields.
contact-other-plane::social_or_knowledge.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar information query fields for contacted entity type, save gate, question count, answer forms, unknown-answer handling, and misleading-answer phrase override.

contact-other-plane::healing_or_restorat.issue: Greater Restoration can end the failed-save Incapacitated effect; runtime lacks spell-specific external removal fields.
contact-other-plane::healing_or_restorat.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition removal override fields keyed to ending spells.
contact-other-plane::healing_or_restorat.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime removableBySpell data for Greater Restoration.

contact-other-plane::status_or_state_cha.issue: Incapacitated is now typed with special duration, but the until-Long-Rest duration and Greater Restoration ending are not first-class.
contact-other-plane::status_or_state_cha.recommendedTemplateChange: Add duration-until-rest and removable-by-spell fields for status effects.
contact-other-plane::status_or_state_cha.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status duration until_long_rest and removableBySpell data.

contact-other-plane::conditional_ending.issue: The caster must ask questions before the one-minute spell duration ends; this is the normal query window, not a separate conditional ending.

contagion::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses one ability, and while Poisoned the target has Disadvantage on saves with that chosen ability; runtime preserves this only in utility prose.
contagion::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-choice fields linked to save-disadvantage riders.

contagion::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Constitution save, damage, and Poisoned condition are typed, but runtime lacks the chosen-ability save disadvantage, three-success/three-failure progression, and save-to-resist condition removal.
contagion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked save-disadvantage rider fields, counted repeat-save tracks, and condition-removal resistance checks.

contagion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.closedReason: Contagion now records the three-success/three-failure repeat-save track in structured Repeat Save Progression and runtime repeatSave.progression data.
contagion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.issue: A turn-end Constitution repeat save is now present, but runtime cannot represent the canonical track of three successes ending the spell or three failures making the Poisoned duration last 7 days.
contagion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add counted repeat-save success/failure threshold fields.
contagion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatSaveTrack with successThreshold 3 and failureThreshold 3.

contagion::conditional_ending.issue: The spell can end on the target after three repeat-save successes, last 7 days after three failures, and resist later Poisoned-ending effects unless another Constitution save succeeds; runtime lacks those ending branches.
contagion::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional status/spell ending fields for counted saves and condition-removal resistance.
contagion::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding and conditionRemovalResistance data.

control-winds::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses Gusts, Downdraft, or Updraft, can later switch/halt/restart with an action, and Gusts also chooses calm/moderate/strong intensity and direction; runtime lacks typed wind mode controls.
control-winds::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental mode fields with action-based switch, halt, restart, direction, and intensity choices.

control-winds::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Moderate/strong Gusts and Downdraft impose disadvantage on ranged weapon attacks through or inside the cube, and Downdraft forces Strength saves on flying creatures; runtime lacks these attack modifier and flying-save fields.
control-winds::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area attack-roll modifier fields and flying-only save trigger fields.
control-winds::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime windAttackDisadvantage and downdraftFlyingSave data.

control-winds::forced_movement.issue: Downdraft knocks flying creatures Prone on a failed Strength save; runtime lacks this status/forced-state branch.

control-winds::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary visible area selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

control-winds::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched sustained wind effects, but this spell does not create a ward or alarm.
control-winds::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under environmental mode and attack/movement fields.

control-winds::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: The detector matched a Strength save trigger for flying creatures; this is a movement/status mechanic, not social or knowledge behavior.
control-winds::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under attack/save, forced movement, and status fields.

control-winds::status_or_state_change.issue: Downdraft applies Prone on failed Strength saves for flying creatures; runtime lacks typed mode-specific Prone application.

control-winds::environmental_change.issue: The spell controls air in a 100-foot cube with Gusts, Downdraft, and Updraft modes affecting ranged attacks, movement cost, falling damage, vertical jumps, and flying creatures; runtime is still generic utility prose.
control-winds::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-air environmental fields for wind modes, intensity, direction, movement cost, fall damage reduction, jump bonus, and flying-creature interactions.
